title: iberis × correifolia
intro: Iberis × correifolia, also known as Candytuft or Rock Candy, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, derived from the cross between Iberis amara and Corridifolia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Iberis × correifolia include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
